title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
